patch.summary: Set the simulated-clock speed for the whole fleet (simulation-only)
patch.description: Fan the requested speed out to every greenhouse as N independent per-controller writes — there is NO shared/master clock; each controller's simulated clock stays independent (controller HAL §7). Returns the per-greenhouse outcome; a greenhouse whose controller is offline or on real hardware is reported as not applied rather than failing the whole request. A simulation-only diagnostic, NOT a setpoint — an explicit, narrow exception to the platform's setpoint-only downward control (platform constraints §7). An out-of-range requested scale is rejected with 422.

200.description: Per-greenhouse outcome of the fleet-wide fan-out.
